case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. MARA ROSEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ALL ATTORNEYS' FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROSEN, MARA
